name: Tantalizing Tempeh Dinner
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Broccoli florets, in bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking pan with soy oil.
3. Soak and rinse dulse 2 or 3 times in cold water.
4. Combine soaked dulse with the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking pan.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
